leadText: Sand Stream (Japanese: すなおこし Sand Raising) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation IV, it was the signature Ability of Tyranitar.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III-V 1.1.2 Generation VI onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III-V [ edit | edit source ] Sand Stream summons a sandstorm in battle as soon as a Pokémon with Sand Stream enters the battle. Its effects almost are the same as Sandstorm 's; the only difference is that instead of lasting for five turns, it lasts for the whole battle or until a different weather condition replaces it. If a Pokémon with Sand Stream is sent out in the same turn as another Pokémon whose Ability causes a different weather condition, the slower Pokémon's Ability will override the faster Pokémon's Ability. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] The sandstorm will now last only for five turns. This can be extended to eight turns if the Pokémon is holding a Smooth Rock . If heavy rain , extremely harsh sunlight , or strong winds are present, Sand Stream will fail to activate. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Stream has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III-V [ edit | edit source ] Sand Stream summons a sandstorm in battle as soon as a Pokémon with Sand Stream enters the battle. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] The sandstorm will now last only for five turns. This can be extended to eight turns if the Pokémon is holding a Smooth Rock . sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Changes the weather to a sandstorm. B S L てんきを すなあらしに してしまう MD GtI Unavailable S MD The weather on the floor will be a sandstorm! MD RT DX The weather condition on the floor will be a Sandstorm.
